name: Brandied Cherry Clafouti
recipeIngredient: 3 cups drained black or red cherries (preferably canned in water)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonreactive bowl, mix the drained cherries, brandy, and 1/3 cup of sugar. Let sit for 1 hour.
2. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Butter a 9-inch pie pan.
3. Place the sifted flour in a medium bowl and make a well in the center.
4. Drain the cherries, reserving the liquid. Pour the liquid into a blender and add the remaining 1/3 cup sugar, milk, eggs, vanilla, allspice, lemon zest, and salt. Blend well.
5. Pour the liquid mixture into the well in the flour and blend into a smooth batter.
6. Spread the cherries evenly in the prepared pan. Pour the batter over the fruit.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 5 minutes, then reduce the heat to 350°F (175°C) and bake for an additional 45 to 50 minutes until the clafouti is puffy and golden. A sharp knife inserted into the center should come out clean.
8. Let cool. Dust with confectioners' sugar and serve warm.
